sentences.arabic: يَعْتَمِدُ النِّظَامُ الْغِذَائِيُّ فِي حَوْضِ الْمُتَوَسِّطِ عَلَى زَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ كَمَصْدَرٍ أَسَاسِيٍّ لِلدُّهُونِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Režim ishrane u mediteranskom bazenu oslanja se na maslinovo ulje kao osnovni izvor zdravih masnoća.
sentences.translationEn: The diet in the Mediterranean basin relies on olive oil as a primary source of healthy fats.

sentences.arabic: تُشِيرُ الدِّرَاسَاتُ الْحَدِيثَةُ إِلَى أَنَّ الِاعْتِمَادَ عَلَى الْبُقُولِيَّاتِ وَالْحُبُوبِ الْكَامِلَةِ يُسَاهِمُ فِي تَعْزِيزِ صِحَّةِ الْقَلْبِ وَالْجِهَازِ الْهَضْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Savremene studije ukazuju na to da oslanjanje na mahunarke i integralne žitarice doprinosi jačanju zdravlja srca i probavnog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Modern studies indicate that relying on legumes and whole grains contributes to enhancing heart and digestive system health.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِ السَّلَطَاتِ الَّتِي تَحْتَوِي عَلَى مَجْمُوعَةٍ وَاسِعَةٍ مِنَ الْفِيتَامِينَاتِ وَالْمَعَادِنِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapsku kuhinju karakteriše raznovrsnost salata koje sadrže širok spektar neophodnih vitamina i minerala.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by a variety of salads that contain a wide range of essential vitamins and minerals.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يُنْصَحُ دَائِمًا بِتَقْلِيلِ السُّكَّرِيَّاتِ الْمُصَنَّعَةِ وَاسْتِبْدَالِهَا بِالْفَوَاكِهِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى رَشَاقَةِ الْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga se uvijek savjetuje smanjenje prerađenih šećera i njihova zamjena prirodnim voćem radi očuvanja vitkosti tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, it is always recommended to reduce processed sugars and replace them with natural fruits to maintain body fitness.

sentences.arabic: فَالِاعْتِدَالُ فِي تَنَاوُلِ الطَّعَامِ هُوَ الْقَاعِدَةُ الذَّهَبِيَّةُ الَّتِي تَدْعُو إِلَيْهَا الثَّقَافَةُ الْغِذَائِيَّةُ السَّلِيمَةُ.
sentences.translation: Umjerenost u jelu je zlatno pravilo na koje poziva ispravna kultura ishrane.
sentences.translationEn: Moderation in eating is the golden rule advocated by a sound nutritional culture.
